title: FINANCIAL WELLNESS WORKSHOP - 211info
text: NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER FINANCIAL WELLNESS WORKSHOP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a one-day, in-person financial empowerment class. Topics include money culture, savings goals, credit and debt, and credit scores and reports. Coffee, snack, and lunch provided. Participants will receive a workbook and a Certificate of Completion. 5135 NE Columbia Boulevard Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Saturday, May 23, 2026 9am-4pm (503) 607-8704 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Person (503) 607-8704 [email protected] Natalie Mitchell INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit Facebook page for more information FEES: None AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Financial Literacy Training Other Services Offered At This Location: MONEY MANAGEMENT - FINANCIAL EMPOWERMENT 4 YOUTH MONEY MANAGEMENT - FINANCIAL WELLNESS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
